mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_analysis ( interview_id, answer_id, user_id, professionalism_score, logic_score, communication_score, total_score, feedback, improvement_answer, status ) VALUES ( #{interviewId}, #{answerId}, #{userId}, #{professionalismScore}, #{logicScore}, #{communicationScore}, #{totalScore}, #{feedback}, #{improvementAnswer}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_analysis WHERE interview_id = #{interviewId} ORDER BY analysis_id DESC LIMIT 1
